rag_rules: Repair only AGREE annex clauses that directly resolve type mismatches or unresolved identifiers in the target component's scope.
Do not add new properties, packages, or external references not already present in the AADL model.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE expressions use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers.
Use int, real, or bool as scalar types—never integer or boolean.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Equality and range checks must return bool; use eq helpers to express conditions before guarantees.
Guarantees must reference only existing outputs or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or property references absent from the model's with clauses.
Never repair by adding new component types, subcomponents, or connections—only fix invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
